content.text:
# Memory Log - 2026-03-07

## King AI v2 Research Findings (Task: fd396104-cfc)

### 1. Architecture Overview
King AI v2 is an autonomous business empire management system designed to operate as an AI CEO. Three core layers:

**MASTER BRAIN** - Central coordination for high-level goals, resource allocation, empire-wide strategic context. Single source of truth for business decisions.

**SPECIALIZED AGENTS** - Domain-specific fleet:
- Finance Agent: Budgeting, cash flow, P&L tracking, tax optimization
- Marketing Agent: Campaigns, content, SEO, social media, analytics
- Operations Agent: Inventory, suppliers, fulfillment, customer service
- Product Agent: R&D, feature prioritization, user feedback analysis
- Legal/Compliance Agent: Contracts, regulations, risk mitigation

**LLM ROUTER** - Intelligent request routing with confidence scoring for human escalation.

Key Capabilities: Multi-business orchestration (10+ simultaneously), real-time financial dashboard, automated vendor management, competitive intelligence. Integrates with Shopify, Stripe, AWS, QuickBooks, 50+ services via REST API and webhooks.

---

### 2. Business Lifecycle State Machine
Formal 7-stage process with playbooks:

| Stage | Purpose | Output |
|-------|---------|--------|
| DISCOVERY | Market opportunity ID, competitor mapping | Go/No-Go decision |
| VALIDATION | MVP scope, landing page testing, pricing | Validated learning doc |
| SETUP | Entity registration, banking, supplier onboarding | Launch-ready entity |
| OPERATION | Daily execution, fulfillment, support | Profitable business |
| OPTIMIZATION | CAC/LTV improvement, funnel optimization | Efficiency metrics |
| REPLICATION | Playbook extraction, template creation | Replicable model |
| SUNSET | Exit execution, liquidation, migration | Closed archive |

**Pre-built Playbooks:**
- Dropshipping: AliExpress → Shopify → Facebook Ads → Zendesk
- SaaS: AWS → Stripe → Plaid → Intercom → Linear

---

### 3. Risk Profile System
Three operational modes with tiered approval:

**CONSERVATIVE** ($50 threshold): 10% max deployment, 3-month runway, 24-48h latency. For first-time entrepreneurs.

**MODERATE** ($500 threshold): 25% max deployment, 1-month runway, same-day approval. For experienced operators.

**AGGRESSIVE** ($5000 threshold): 50% deployable, 2-week runway, real-time execution. For rapid scaling.

All modes include human-in-the-loop controls (email/Slack/SMS), override capability, kill switch, weekly digest with audit trail.

---

### 4. Self-Evolution Engine
Controlled self-improvement with safety constraints:

- **Rate Limit:** 1 modification per 24 hours, cooldown periods, emergency pause
- **Confidence Threshold:** 80% minimum via multi-model consensus, historical rates, risk assessment
- **Modification Types:** Prompt refinement, workflow adjustment, agent specialization, routing optimization
- **Sandbox Testing:** 7-day simulation, A/B testing before deployment
- **Rollback:** Automatic on P0 incidents, >10% degradation, or human override. 30-day history.
- **Hard-coded Safety:** Cannot modify rate limits, grant permissions, or disable human controls

---

**Tags:** king-ai-v2, business-automation, ai-ceo, architecture, research

arguments.content:
# King AI v2 — 90-Day Launch Timeline

**Product:** Autonomous Business Empire Management System (AI CEO)  
**Launch Target:** Day 90 (Public Availability)  
**Created:** 2026-03-07 by Gamma Manager  

---

## 🎯 Executive Summary

| Phase | Days | Focus | Key Milestone |
|-------|------|-------|---------------|
| **Pre-Launch** | 0-60 | Foundation, Branding, Beta Test | Beta launch with 10 early users |
| **Launch Week** | 61-67 | Public announcement, PR, onboarding | Public availability |
| **Post-Launch** | 68-90 | Optimization, Scale, Support | 100 active users, <2h support SLA |

**Critical Path:** Core platform → Security audit → Beta launch → Payment integration → Public launch

---

## 📋 Phase 1: Pre-Launch (Days 0-60)

### Week 1 (Days 0-7): Foundation Sprint ⚡

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 0 | Architecture finalization | Tech Lead | System architecture doc | — |
| 1-2 | Dev environment setup | DevOps | CI/CD pipelines, staging env | Day 0 |
| 2-3 | Database schema design | Backend Lead | PostgreSQL + ChromaDB schemas | Day 0 |
| 3-5 | Master Brain API development | Backend Team | Core orchestration API | Day 2 |
| 5-7 | Agent framework scaffold | Backend Team | Agent base classes, comms layer | Day 3 |

**🚩 Milestone 1:** Development environment operational, Master Brain API functional  
**Meta:** Days 0-7 are on the critical path — delays here cascade through entire timeline.

---

### Week 2 (Days 8-14): Core Platform Build ⚡

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 8-10 | Agent registration system | Backend Team | Dynamic agent onboarding | Week 1 |
| 10-12 | Permission broker v1 | Security Lead | Role-based access control | Week 1 |
| 12-14 | LLM Router implementation | ML Engineer | Multi-provider routing (NVIDIA, etc.) | Week 1 |

**🚩 Milestone 2:** Agents can register, authenticate, and route LLM requests  

---

### Week 3 (Days 15-21): First Agents Deploy ⚡

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 15-17 | Finance Agent v1 | Finance Dev | P&L tracking, QuickBooks integration | Week 2 |
| 17-19 | Marketing Agent v1 | Marketing Dev | Campaign management, analytics | Week 2 |
| 19-21 | Operations Agent v1 | Operations Dev | Supplier management, inventory | Week 2 |
| 20 | Internal integration test | QA Lead | End-to-end workflow test | Days 17-19 |

**🚩 Milestone 3:** 3 specialized agents operational with basic integrations

---

### Week 4 (Days 22-28): Remaining Agents + Memory System ⚡

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 22-25 | Product Agent + Legal Agent | Product/Legal Devs | Feature prioritization, compliance | Week 3 |
| 25-28 | 3-Tier Memory System | ML Engineer | Redis + PostgreSQL + ChromaDB | Week 2 |
| 27 | Agent-to-agent messaging | Backend Team | Inter-agent comms protocol | Day 25 |

**🚩 Milestone 4:** All 5 specialized agents deployed, memory system functional  

---

### Week 5 (Days 29-35): Dashboard + UI Foundation

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 29-32 | Web dashboard scaffold | Frontend Lead | React + TypeScript shell | — |
| 32-35 | Agent status views | Frontend Dev | Real-time agent monitoring | Day 29 |
| 34 | Cost tracking dashboard | Frontend Dev | Per-model usage, budgets | Week 3 |

**Meta:** Dashboard work is NOT on critical path — launch possible with API-only access.

---

### Week 6 (Days 36-42): Integrations + QA Phase 1 ⚡

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 36-38 | Shopify + Stripe integration | Finance Dev | E-commerce payment flow | Week 3 |
| 38-40 | AWS + QuickBooks connectors | DevOps | Cloud + accounting sync | Week 3 |
| 40-42 | Security audit (internal) | Security Lead | Vulnerability report + fixes | All above |

**🚩 Milestone 5:** Major integrations complete, internal security audit passed ⚡  
**Meta:** Day 42 security audit is CRITICAL PATH — cannot launch beta without sign-off.

---

### Week 7 (Days 43-49): Beta Preparation

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 43-45 | Beta candidate build | Tech Lead | Release candidate v0.9 | Week 6 |
| 45-46 | Beta tester onboarding flow | UX Lead | Self-service invite system | Day 43 |
| 46-48 | Documentation (API + guides) | Tech Writer | docs.kingai.com live | Day 45 |
| 48-49 | Beta launch dry run | All | Simulated user onboards | Day 46 |

**🚩 Milestone 6:** Beta-ready build, documentation complete

---

### Week 8-9 (Days 50-60): Branding + Website Sprint

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 50-54 | Brand identity | Design Lead | Logo, colors, typography | — |
| 52-56 | Landing page design | Design Lead | Figma mocks → dev handoff | Day 50 |
| 54-58 | Landing page development | Frontend Dev | kingai.com marketing site | Day 52 |
| 56-59 | Content creation | Marketing | Value props, case studies | Day 54 |
| 59-60 | Website launch | DevOps | DNS, SSL, analytics | Day 58 |

**🚩 Milestone 7:** Public-facing brand and website live  
**Meta:** Branding is NOT critical path — can launch with minimal site. However, strongly recommended before public launch.

---

### 🔴 Critical Path Analysis: Pre-Launch

```
Day 0 ──[Architecture]── Day 7 ──[Core Platform]── Day 14 ──[Agents]── Day 21
  │                              │                         │
  └───[Parallel: Dashboard]─────┴───[Parallel: Remaining Agents]──────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
                              Day 28 [Memory]
                                    │
                                    ▼
                         Day 35 [Integrations]
                                    │
                                    ▼
                         Day 42 [Security Audit] ⚡ MUST PASS
                                    │
                                    ▼
                         Day 49 [Beta Candidate]
                                    │
                                    ▼
                         Day 60 [Beta Launch] 🚩
```

---

## 🚀 Phase 2: Launch Week (Days 61-67)

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| **61** | Beta launch to early users | Product | 10 users onboarded | Day 60 |
| 61-62 | Payment gateway integration ⚡ | Finance Dev | Stripe billing live | Day 61 |
| 62-63 | Pricing plans configuration | Product | $49/$199/$999 tiers active | Day 62 |
| 63-64 | Public announcement prep | Marketing | PR draft, social assets | Day 62 |
| 64 | Support system activation | Operations | Zendesk live, 4h SLA | Day 61 |
| **65** | 🚀 **PUBLIC LAUNCH** 🚀 | CEO/All | kingai.com public access | Days 61-64 |
| 65-66 | Launch day monitoring | DevOps | On-call rotation, dashboards | Day 65 |
| 66-67 | Post-launch hotfixes | All | P0 issues resolved | Day 65 |

**🚩 Milestone 8:** PUBLIC LAUNCH — King AI v2 live with paid tiers  
**🚩 Milestone 9:** First 50 signups within 48 hours of launch

### 🔴 Critical Path: Launch Week

```
Day 60 ──[Beta Live]── Day 61 ──[Payment Integration]── Day 62 ──[Pricing]── Day 65
                                                                          │
                                                                          ▼
                                                               🚀 PUBLIC LAUNCH 🚀
```

**CRITICAL ITEM:** Payment integration (Day 62) is last gate before launch. Delays here delay launch.

---

## 📈

arguments.new_string:
---

## 📈 Phase 3: Post-Launch Optimization (Days 68-90)

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable | Dependencies |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| 68-70 | Performance optimization | Engineering | <200ms API response time | Day 67 |
| 68-72 | User feedback triage | Product | Top 10 feature requests identified | Day 65 |
| 70-74 | Onboarding funnel analysis | Marketing | Funnel drop-off report | Day 68 |
| 72-76 | Quick wins implementation | Engineering | Top 3 user pain points fixed | Day 70 |
| 74-78 | Support SLA improvement | Operations | <2h first response time | Day 68 |
| 78-82 | Agent expansion v1.1 | Engineering | 2 new agent types (dev, sales) | Day 76 |
| 82-86 | Scale testing | DevOps | Load test: 1,000 concurrent agents | Day 78 |
| 86-90 | Metrics review + planning | Leadership | Q2 roadmap, OKRs | Day 82 |

**🚩 Milestone 10:** 100 active users with <2h support SLA  
**🚩 Milestone 11:** System handles 1,000 concurrent agents  
**🚩 Milestone 12:** 90-day retrospective complete

---

## 🔴 Complete Critical Path Summary

```
Day 0  → Architecture finalization                    [BLOCKER]
Day 7  → Core platform operational                   [BLOCKER]
Day 14 → Agent framework complete                    [BLOCKER]
Day 21 → First 3 agents deployed                     [BLOCKER]
Day 28 → All agents + memory system                   [BLOCKER]
Day 35 → Key integrations live                        [BLOCKER]
Day 42 → Security audit PASSED ⚡                     [GATE]
Day 49 → Beta candidate ready                         [BLOCKER]
Day 60 → Beta launch with 10 users                    [GATE]
Day 62 → Payment integration complete                 [BLOCKER]
Day 65 → 🚀 PUBLIC LAUNCH 🚀                          [MILESTONE]
```

**BUFFERS:**
- Days 43-60: 17 days between security audit and public launch
- Days 28-35: Dashboard work runs parallel to integrations (can delay if needed)
- Days 50-60: Branding runs parallel to beta prep (can launch without full branding)

---

## 👥 Owners & RACI Matrix

### Leadership
| Role | Name | Responsibility |
|------|------|----------------|
| Executive Sponsor | CEO | Final decisions, resource allocation |
| Tech Lead | TBD | Technical architecture, code quality |
| Product Lead | TBD | Feature prioritization, user feedback |

### Teams
| Team | Lead | Scope |
|------|------|-------|
| Backend | Backend Lead | APIs, agents, integrations, memory |
| Frontend | Frontend Lead | Dashboard, landing page, UI |
| ML/AI | ML Engineer | LLM routing, agent intelligence |
| DevOps | DevOps Lead | Infrastructure, CI/CD, security |
| Marketing | Marketing Lead | Brand, content, PR, launch |
| Operations | Operations Lead | Support, documentation, onboarding |

---

## 📊 Success Metrics

### Adoption
| Metric | Day 30 | Day 60 | Day 90 |
|--------|--------|--------|--------|
| Beta users | — | 10 | — |
| Public signups | — | — | 100+ |
| Active users (7-day) | — | — | 50+ |
| Paid conversions | — | — | 10% |

### Technical
| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| API uptime | 99.9% | Monitoring dashboard |
| API latency (p99) | <500ms | APM metrics |
| Agent accuracy | >80% | User validation |
| Support SLA | <2h | Zendesk metrics |

### Quality
| Metric | Target | Owner |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Critical bugs | 0 at launch | QA Lead |
| Security vulnerabilities | 0 high/critical | Security Lead |
| Documentation coverage | 100% core flows | Tech Writer |

---

## ⚠️ Risk Register

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation | Owner |
|------|------------|--------|------------|-------|
| LLM provider rate limits | Medium | High | Multi-provider fallback, caching | ML Engineer |
| Security audit fails | Low | Critical | Weekly security reviews, early audit | Security Lead |
| Agent coordination bugs | Medium | High | Automated testing, chaos engineering | QA Lead |
| Integration delays | Medium | High | Prioritize critical path, mock services | Tech Lead |
| Beta users churn | Medium | Medium | Daily feedback sessions, quick fixes | Product Lead |
| Payment issues at launch | Low | Critical | Stripe sandbox testing, manual fallback | Finance Dev |

---

## 📎 Dependencies Summary

### External Services
| Service | Integration Day | Test Account |
|---------|-----------------|--------------|
| Stripe | Day 36 | test_... |
| QuickBooks | Day 38 | sandbox |
| Shopify | Day 36 | dev store |
| AWS | Day 38 | staging env |
| Zendesk | Day 64 | subdomain |

### Vendor SLAs
| Vendor | SLA | Escalation Contact |
|--------|-----|-------------------|
| NVIDIA API | 99.9% | support@nvidia.com |
| Stripe | 99.99% | +1-... |
| AWS | 99.99% | TAM assigned |

---

## 📁 Appendices

### Appendix A: Daily Standup Template
```
Day 45 Daily Standup — King AI Launch

BLOCKERS (need help):
- Backend: Waiting for Stripe test credentials

YESTERDAY:
- Backend: Finance Agent QuickBooks integration complete
- Frontend: Dashboard shell 80% complete

TODAY:
- Backend: Start Shopify connector
- Frontend: Complete agent status views
- DevOps: Security audit prep

CRITICAL PATH STATUS: 🟢 On track
```

### Appendix B: Go/No-Go Checklist (Day 64)
**Launch Gate**: Day 65 public launch requires ALL items complete:

- [ ] Security audit passed (Security Lead sign-off)
- [ ] Payment integration tested (successful test transactions)
- [ ] Pricing plans configured ($49/$199/$999)
- [ ] Support system live (Zendesk, 4hr SLA capability)
- [ ] Monitoring dashboards operational (Datadog/New Relic)
- [ ] On-call rotation scheduled
- [ ] Rollback plan documented (<30 min RTO)
- [ ] Legal: ToS, Privacy Policy live
- [ ] Marketing: PR draft approved, Social assets ready
- [ ] Beta feedback addressed (critical issues only)

**Go/No-Go Decision:** [ ] GO  [ ] NO-GO — Decision owner: CEO

### Appendix C: Post-Launch War Room Protocol
**Days 65-67: Engineering war room active**

**Location:** Zoom bridge + Slack #launch-war-room
**Schedule:**
- Every 2 hours: Metrics check-in (5 min)
- P0 incident: Immediate escalation (CEO + Tech Lead paged)
- EOD summary: Report to #launch-updates

**Decision Authority:**
- Hotfixes: Tech Lead can approve <1 day effort
- Feature holds: Product Lead
- Rollback: CEO + Tech Lead consensus

---

## 📝 Document History

| Version | Date | Author | Changes |
|---------|------|--------|---------|
| 1.0 | 2026-03-07 | Gamma Manager | Initial 90-day timeline created |

---
